task_completion.description: Verify the agent has logged into the application as the admin user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The application dashboard or home screen is visible, and the logged-in user is indicated as 'admin'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent has navigated to the user or provider management section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A page displaying a list of users, providers, or an administration menu for managing accounts is visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent has opened the profile or settings for Dr. James Carter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A configuration form or profile page specifically for 'Dr. James Carter' or username 'demo_provider' is displayed.

task_completion.description: Verify the schedule time increment has been changed to 15 minutes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dropdown, input field, or setting labeled 'Schedule Increment', 'Time Increment', or similar shows the value '15' or '15 minutes' (changed from 20).

task_completion.description: Verify the configuration changes have been saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message (e.g., 'Profile updated', 'Saved successfully') is visible, or the settings page shows the saved value of 15 minutes after a save action.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the web-based graphical user interface to make the changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser with the application interface, not terminal windows or API testing tools.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use direct database queries or terminal commands to update the provider profile.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing SQL UPDATE commands or scripts modifying the database directly.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply type the expected outcome into a text editor or mock interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interactions occur within the genuine application interface, with proper styling, menus, and layout.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target provider: Dr. James Carter (username: demo_provider). Initial schedule increment: 20 minutes. Expected schedule increment: 15 minutes.
